name: conditional_indexed_memory_write
description: Code should include a conditional procedural assignment that writes to a memory location indexed by a computed address, where the address computation involves arithmetic or shifting operations on write enable signals
snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin if (wen[i]) big[wa[i]] <= wd[wa[i]]; end

name: multiported_memory_with_generate_reads
description: Code should include a large memory array with multiple read ports created via generate loop, where each read port uses an independently indexed address
snippet: logic [63:0][32:0] big; generate for (genvar i = 0; i < 9; i++) assign rd[i] = big[ra[i]]; endgenerate

name: diverging_converging_mux_chains
description: Code should include a design pattern where multiple conditional branches (from multiple indexed memory writes) converge on a shared data structure, creating many multiplexer cells with overlapping signal relationships
snippet: for (int i = 0; i < 9; i++) if (wen[i]) big[wa[i]] <= wd[wa[i]];

name: procedural_clock_control_with_reset
description: Code should include an always block with clocked logic and a conditional reset that initializes a large array, where subsequent operations within the block are control-dependent on the reset signal
snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin if (rst_clk) big <= '0; else begin for (int i = 0; i < 9; i++) if (wen[i]) big[wa[i]] <= wd[wa[i]]; end end
